input.command:
# Check what the Relay currencies return for Solana - specifically the address field
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chainIds":[792703809],"defaultList":true,"limit":10}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for c in d[:10]:
    print(f'symbol={c.get(\"symbol\")} address={c.get(\"address\")} isNative={c.get(\"metadata\",{}).get(\"isNative\")}')
"

state.title:
# Check what the Relay currencies return for Solana - specifically the address field
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chainIds":[792703809],"defaultList":true,"limit":10}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for c in d[:10]:
    print(f'symbol={c.get(\"symbol\")} address={c.get(\"address\")} isNative={c.get(\"metadata\",{}).get(\"isNative\")}')
"
